$comment: Wi-Health Realtime Database structure contract. Types use TS-ish notation; 'epochMs' = integer milliseconds since epoch (server time). Enforced by cloud/database.rules.json.

$uid.role: 'app_user' | 'admin'  — mirror of the token claim, for display/queries; claim is authoritative

devices.$deviceId: true  — devices linked to this account (written by admin only)

fcmTokens.$token: true  — push registration tokens for this account

meta.ownerUid: string ($uid of the linked App User)

live.$comment: Written by the device every ~5 s. See device-live-schema.json.

$alertId.acknowledged: boolean (owner or admin may set true)

$complaintId.uid: string (author — must equal auth.uid on create)
$complaintId.subject: string

accessSummary.settings: admin-only read/write for primary admin panel preferences
accessSummary.users/$uid: read/write self; admin read/write all; role + devices subtrees admin-write only
accessSummary.devices/$deviceId/live|sessions|health: write: that device's token only; read: linked owner + admin
accessSummary.devices/$deviceId/meta: write: admin; read: linked owner + admin
accessSummary.alerts/$deviceId: write: device (create) + owner/admin (acknowledge); read: linked owner + admin
accessSummary.complaints: create: any authed app_user (own uid); read: author + admin; status/adminResponse: admin only
